name: Spiced Apple Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine 1/3 cup apple juice and cornstarch; mix well.
2. Add the remaining apple juice to the mixture in the saucepan. Place over medium heat and cook, stirring until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat and simmer for 2 minutes. Remove from heat.
4. In a bowl, beat the egg with a fork. Gradually add hot mixture to the beaten egg, stirring until smooth.
5. Return the egg mixture immediately to the saucepan and stir constantly (the hot mixture will cook the egg).
6. Stir in sweetener and cinnamon. Pour into 4 dessert dishes, cover with plastic wrap to prevent skin from forming.
7. Cool at room temperature or chill in refrigerator.
